description_long: This object is a monolithic stone chaise with a sculpted, reclining human form integrated into its upper surface, reminiscent of ancient sarcophagi or ceremonial benches. The chaise is carved from a single block of stone, with a rough, weathered texture and subtle surface irregularities that suggest significant age and exposure to the elements. The headrest area is elevated and rounded, while the body section gently slopes downward, following the contours of the human figure. The sides and base are blocky and robust, with no visible legs or separations, giving the piece a solid, grounded appearance. There are faint, shallow engravings or reliefs along the sides, possibly decorative or symbolic in nature. The overall coloration is a muted, sandy beige with natural stone variations and patina.
description: A solid, stone chaise with a sculpted reclining human form and a rough, weathered surface, featuring faint engravings and a blocky, monolithic base.
description_view_0: The rear-left view highlights the blocky, solid base and the elevated headrest, with the backrest's gentle curve and rough stone texture clearly visible.
description_view_1: The left-front view showcases the sculpted human form on the upper surface, the sloping body section, and the faint engravings along the side.
description_view_2: The front-right view emphasizes the elongated, gently sloping surface and the rounded headrest, with the chaise's robust, monolithic construction apparent.
description_view_3: The rear-right view reveals the chaise's solid, continuous base and the subtle curvature of the upper surface, with minimal visible detail on the back.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is integrated into the sculpted human form, rising smoothly from the base with a gentle curve and rounded top, lacking any segmentation or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present; the sides are solid and continuous with the base.
attribute_leg_style: There are no visible legs; the chaise rests directly on a solid, monolithic stone base that extends the full length and width of the object.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: There is no upholstery; the surface is bare stone with a rough, weathered texture and some faint engravings.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: No cushions are present; the upper surface is a single, continuous sculpted stone form without any attached or loose cushions.
